# ANALYSIS: ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER real-fills verification on last 30 days

**Filed:** 2026-06-18
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** analysis
**Status:** DRAFT

## Hypothesis

We are to verify the ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER watcher gate (long-only) on the last 30 days of SPY data using chart-stop-only exits (premium_stop=-0.99) to compute win rate and average P&L per trade, and compare to the watcher baseline WR=70.4%.

## Mechanism

We would run a Stage-1 backtest on the last 30 days of SPY 5m data, applying the ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER (long-only) and the chart-stop exit rule (premium_stop=-0.99, chart stop at ORH). We would then compute the win rate and average P&L per trade.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline
2. **Sample bias:** The last 30 days may not be representative of the entire 16-month window; overfit risk if the last 30 days are a particular regime (e.g., trending market).
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (we are only doing a real-fills verification on the last 30 days, which is in-sample relative to the entire 16-month window? Actually, we are doing a real-fills verification on the last 30 days, which is a walk-forward held-out window if we consider the prior 13 months as training. But we are not told to do OOS, so we mark as NEEDS-OOS for a proper OOS test.)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (verification not yet performed)
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: unknown; max drawdown: unknown; blow-up scenario: if the last 30 days include a high-volatility reversal day, the filter may take losses.
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest

## Pre-merge gate

<what tests need to pass: gym validators, walk-forward, real-fills>
We require the real-fills verification on the last 30 days to pass: WR >= 70.4% (the watcher baseline) and positive average P&L per trade.

0 / 10 -- We have not run the verification; this analysis is a placeholder.
